name: How long do I have to file a claim after falling at work in Ogden? I'm scared I'm already too late.
description: In Utah, notify your employer within 30-180 days; in Idaho, within 60 days. Formal legal filing deadlines vary by state but typically range from one to six year

mainEntity.name: How long do I have to file a claim after falling at work in Ogden? I'm scared I'm already too late.

acceptedAnswer.text: In Utah, notify your employer within 30-180 days; in Idaho, within 60 days. Formal legal filing deadlines vary by state but typically range from one to six years from the injury date.
